notes: eCode360 Ch. 275 Zoning (SH3206; §2.0 Districts, §3.2 Table of Use Regulations = Attachment 1 PDF, adopted 5-2-2022 amended thru 5-5-2025). Sharon parcels were ~98.8% NULL -> MAPC layer 2 strip 266-prefix fills them spatially. code_map: MAPC SA/SB -> ordinance SRA/SRB (Single Residence), BD -> BD1 (Business D). MAPC collapses Pro A/Pro B to 'P' and Sub A/Sub B to SUB1/SUB2 (all residential/business = prohibited for the 4 uses, so cosmetic). HA (Housing Authority) has no use-table column -> residential-public, prohibited.
